summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nameh.me email platform preview app. Backend API achieved 100% success rate (19/19 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all major functionality including 3-column layout, authentication, email operations, compose modal, RTL toggle, and folder navigation.
passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (/api/health, /api/health/live)
Authentication endpoints (login with demo@nameh.me/demo123, registration, invalid login handling)
User profile endpoints (GET /api/users/me, PATCH /api/users/me)
Mail folder endpoints (GET /api/mail/folders with correct unread counts)
Email retrieval (GET /api/mail/emails for all folders: inbox, sent, drafts, spam, trash)
Email details (GET /api/mail/emails/{id} with full email body)
Email actions (star/unstar, read/unread via POST /api/mail/emails/{id}/action)
Email search functionality (GET /api/mail/emails?search=welcome)
Email composition (POST /api/mail/compose)
Mail status endpoint (GET /api/mail/status)
Frontend auth page loads with demo credentials display
Login flow with demo@nameh.me/demo123 redirects to mail dashboard
3-column layout (sidebar, email list, reading pane) renders correctly
Email list displays 5 inbox emails with proper metadata
Clicking emails opens them in reading pane with subject, body, date
Email action buttons (reply, star, read, trash) are present and functional
Compose modal opens, accepts input, and closes properly
Search input filters emails correctly
Folder navigation works for all folders (inbox, sent, drafts, spam, trash)
Folder unread counts display correctly (Inbox: 1, Spam: 2)
RTL toggle switches layout direction correctly
Logout functionality returns user to auth page
